tagline: The only loop-engineering repo where you can see the logs, the cost, and the output of every example.
definition: Loop engineering is the practice of running an AI coding agent in a governed, verifiable loop until a clearly defined goal is met.
socialPreviewText: Loop Engineering Handbook - see the logs, the cost, and the output of every example.
accuracyStance: label-and-cite: volatile specifics are marked 'as of June 2026 - verify before relying'; self-reported figures marked illustrative; all links in SOURCES.md.
